creator: brouwer@annejan.com
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #4)

I have no idea where the path and filesize, date and username of last commit (441503 2017-05-23 05:03:14Z rezny) bit comes from on your side.

As far as I know updates should be ran against the main svn repo and the first line of https://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head/sysutils/qtpass/Makefile is quite conclusive.
All previous patches also have the clean # $FreeBSD$ as line 6 of the patch.

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=215257
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=213623
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=213268
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=210321

If there is anything I can do to help, please let me know how.
